steps.title: Identify what emphasizing a difference requires
steps.content: The question asks which choice “most effectively” emphasizes a difference between the eggs. The passage provides specific measurements: 4.46 cm versus 7.22 cm. Emphasizing a difference means using language and structure that highlights the contrast, not just mentioning both species.

steps.title: Find the choice that makes the contrast unmissable
steps.content:
Choice B places the measurements with the contrast word “whereas” and explicitly states “were longer,” which makes the difference impossible to miss. Choices A and C omit the measurements entirely, and Choice D lists them in parentheses without the contrast language that emphasizes the difference.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
